# Mewstro & SMASHD

This site hosts landing pages for two mobile apps.

## Mewstro — Your Practice Companion
> Music practice tracker with an animated cat mascot

Mewstro is an iOS app that helps musicians build consistent practice habits. It features a one-tap practice timer, daily streak tracking, calendar heatmaps, Apple Watch-style activity rings, repertoire management, a weekly planner, and an animated cat mascot named Mewstro who reacts to your practice in real time.

- Website: https://mewstro.app
- Platform: iOS (iPhone, iPad, Apple Watch)
- Price: Free (Pro upgrade $5.99 one-time, Social Pass $1.99/month)
- Teacher dashboard: Free forever — unlimited students
- Privacy policy: https://mewstro.app/privacy
- Support: https://mewstro.app/support

## SMASHD — The Community Hub for Padel
> Run tournaments, score live, climb leaderboards

SMASHD is a mobile app for running Americano-format padel tournaments. Organisers create tournaments, players join via QR code, scores are submitted courtside in real-time, and leaderboards update instantly. Player profiles track tournament history, win rate, and rating progression.

- Website: https://getsmashd.app
- Web app: https://playsmashd.com
- Platform: iOS, Android (planned)
- Price: Free for players and organisers
- Privacy policy: https://getsmashd.app/privacy
- Support: https://getsmashd.app/support
